summary: Built and hardened a SaaS crypto trading platform with AI capabilities, while developing custom input firmware and a Windows kernel driver for HID emulation.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform development
items.description: Polished the web build and authentication system for the AI-driven trading platform.

items.title: Minimal input automation tool
items.description: Started a lightweight AutoHotKey alternative with interception driver support.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware iteration
items.description: Iterated on feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation firmware for ESP32-S3.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Developed a KMDF input filter driver for capturing and injecting keyboard and mouse events.

items.title: Android TTS engine enhancements
items.description: Expanded the Android text-to-speech engine with new models and intonation controls.

items.title: Personal CV project work
items.description: Worked on a personal C++ project involving mouse/keyboard emulation and screen overlay.

items.title: Crypto trading platform feature push
items.description: Built out proxy infrastructure, billing, strategy templates, and UI overhaul for the trading platform.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Maintained the Windows Explorer file and folder tagging extension.

items.title: E-reader custom firmware
items.description: Built a map application and knowledge base for custom e-reader firmware.

items.title: Proxy client maintenance
items.description: Updated a Clash proxy client fork with new transport support.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted deep research on mixture-of-experts architectures for crypto price prediction.

items.title: On-device LLM assistant
items.description: Built an Android LLM assistant with tool-use and on-device model capabilities.

items.title: E-ink launcher development
items.description: Developed a note-taking-centric launcher for E-ink Android readers.

items.title: Code intelligence engine
items.description: Built a graph-powered code intelligence engine with LSP integration.

items.title: n8n Telegram node maintenance
items.description: Maintained a forked n8n community node for Telegram automation.

items.title: Neovim configuration
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim development environment configuration.

items.title: Poker computer vision research
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline for online poker state extraction.

items.title: Crypto trading strategies
items.description: Developed and optimized numerous algorithmic trading strategies.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Built an autonomous multi-session AI coding assistant.

items.title: Telegram automation tooling
items.description: Worked on a Telegram bot for managing crypto trading operations.

items.title: Content aggregation bot
items.description: Developed a Telegram-based content aggregation and forwarding bot.
